Vendored third-party browser scripts used only by the Word-import feature
in the online admin studio. Loaded on demand, never on the public site.

- `mammoth.browser.min.js` — mammoth.js v1.12.0 (BSD 2-Clause), converts
  .docx to HTML client-side. https://github.com/mwilliamson/mammoth.js
- `turndown.js` — turndown v7.2.4 (MIT), converts HTML to Markdown.
  https://github.com/mixmark-io/turndown
